topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Scikit-Learn. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Data Scientist roles.
whyItMatters: Scikit-Learn is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Scikit-Learn in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Scikit-Learn snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Scikit-Learn?
How does Scikit-Learn handle memory management?
